title: Duyurular
content:
Duyurular

Duyurular

12
						Kasım

2025

Değerli Öğrencilerimiz,

dört yarıyıl

altı yarıyılda

başarısız olup

programı tamamlayamamış

öğrencinin

gerekmektedir.

3 adet karton ciltli tez

Teslim Adresi

İletişim

Enstitü Sekreteri:

mujgan.keskinkilic@okan.edu.tr

(1347)

derya.ozdogan@okan.edu.tr

(1318)

Dear Students,

The duration of the with-thesis master’s program is

four semesters

, and it must be completed within a maximum of

six semesters

. At the end of this period, any student who fails or does not take the thesis defense will be

dismissed from the University

.

Students who have successfully completed their credit courses and wish to

graduate in the Fall semester of the 2025–2026 academic year

are required to

complete their thesis defense by January 30, 2026, at the latest

and

submit the following documents in person

to the

Institute Secretariat

:

Documents to be Submitted

Thesis Approval Form

3 Hardbound Copies of the Thesis

3 CDs in PDF Format

3 Thesis Data Entry Forms

A national or international publication (including conference proceedings)

(This requirement applies only to programs that mandate publication. Please consult your program director for confirmation.)

Plagiarism (Similarity) Report

Declaration of Generative Artificial Intelligence Use

Submission Address

Istanbul Okan University Mecidiyeköy Campus

Contact

Institute Secretary:

mujgan.keskinkilic@okan.edu.tr

Assistant Institute Secretary:

derya.ozdogan@okan.edu.tr
